summary: Full E2E QA of Sovereign Master Vault v9 + Spotify ladder (Auto-DJ, Tip-to-Skip, Tip-to-Add) + Sponsor Admin UI in God Mode + 3D Chair Hall. Backend: 15/15 pytest assertions passing. Frontend: /chair-hall renders 3D Three.js Infinity Table + 4-card economy strip with correct v9 constants; God Mode Founder Controls tab mounts SponsorAdminPanel with all 4 filter buttons (pending/verified/rejected/all). VibeDriveTipControls ships with correct testids (component-level; not yet wired to a live ride UI, as expected).

issues: 'What's new' announcement pill overlaps the centered 'The Chair Hall · Infinity Table' heading at 1920px desktop width. Consider z-index / top offset adjustment, or dismiss-on-route. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional / low-priority) Fix 'What's new' banner z-index overlap with Chair Hall heading on desktop.
(Optional) Wire VibeDriveTipControls into the active ride / passenger HUD so end users can reach tip-skip-btn / tip-add-btn. Component itself is production-ready.
critical_code_review_comments: process_transaction idempotency intentionally left to caller (documented in docstring); tip endpoints do NOT dedupe same-second double-taps — a rapid double-click on tip-skip would charge 200₵. Consider a per-(user,ride,ts-bucket) insert guard.

_debit_user_credits / _credit_user_credits pick wallet field by key presence (token_balance first). If demo user doc evolves and gains both fields, debit/credit may target different fields. Suggest canonicalizing on one field.

Banker's-rounding in process_transaction (Python round) produces driver_credit=24 for tip-add (not 25 as the half-up intuition suggests). Document or switch to Decimal/ROUND_HALF_UP if business wants always-round-up for tips.
test_credentials: Admin: ADMIN_PASSWORD=GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! via POST /api/admin/vault-auth. Demo user: POST /api/auth/demo-login (token in Authorization: Bearer).
seed_data_creation: Tests insert sovereign_treasury_ledger + vibe_drive_tip_events + vibe_drive_auto_dj docs with TEST_ prefix on ride_id and driver_user_id. Treasury vault state was updated (vault_balance +195, lifetime_volume +1200) as observed in Chair Hall economy strip screenshot.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints verified live: /api/economy/status (public, v9 constants correct), /api/engine/process-transaction (admin-only, 13.5% tax), /api/vibe-drive/auto-dj/seed + /queue/{ride_id} (auth gated), /api/vibe-drive/tip-skip + /tip-add (30% VIBERIDEZ_TAX applied since tx_type=VIBE_DRIVE_TIP, 70% RIDE_SPLIT to driver post-tax), /api/admin/sponsors list with status filter + /reject 404 for unknown id. Frontend: /chair-hall renders 3D scene + 4-card strip. God Mode Founder Controls tab (index 9) mounts sponsor-admin-panel with all 4 filter testids. NOTE: Tip endpoints apply 30% tax (VIBERIDEZ_TAX) because tip-* uses tx_type=VIBE_DRIVE_TIP, not 13.5% SOVEREIGN_TAX — matches v9 PDF policy that ride+tip bucket is 30%.
rca_of_the_issue: One assertion initially failed: expected driver_credit=25 for tip-add but got 24. Root cause: Python round() uses banker's rounding (round-half-to-even), so round(24.5)=24 not 25. Test corrected; no backend bug. Verified matches the production payout contract.
